pi_items.metadata_value: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
pi_items.verified_value: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
pi_items.source: Web search confirms this is the correct English title of Einstein's 1905 paper published in Annalen der Physik, Vol. 17, pp. 891-921
Multiple authoritative sources confirm Einstein's 1905 paper 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' was published in Annalen der Physik, Volume 17, pages 891-921

pi_items.verified_value: Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions and Their Computation by Machine, Part I
pi_items.source: Web search and ACM Digital Library confirm the full and official title includes 'and Their Computation by Machine, Part I'. The metadata provides an abbreviated/truncated version of the actual title.
ACM Digital Library and multiple sources confirm McCarthy's paper was published in Communications of the ACM, Volume 3, Number 4, April 1960, pages 184-195

pi_items.metadata_value: A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs
pi_items.verified_value: A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs
pi_items.source: Springer Nature Link and Numerische Mathematik journal confirm this is the correct title. Note the unusual spelling 'Connexion' (not 'Connection') is authentic to the original publication.
Springer Nature and academic repositories confirm Dijkstra's paper was published in Numerische Mathematik, Volume 1, pages 269-271, 1959
Wikipedia, Wiley Online Library, and IEEE Xplore confirm this is the correct title of Shannon's foundational 1948 paper
Wiley Online Library and Bell Labs/Nokia records confirm Shannon's paper was published in Bell System Technical Journal, Volume 27, July-October 1948, pages 379-423 and 623-656

privileged_info_summary: Three of four papers have verified metadata: Einstein's 1905 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' in Annalen der Physik is correctly identified, as are Dijkstra's 1959 'A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs' in Numerische Mathematik and Shannon's 1948 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' in Bell System Technical Journal. However, McCarthy's paper title is incomplete: the full title is 'Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions and Their Computation by Machine, Part I', not merely 'Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions'. The publication venue (Communications of the ACM) is correct. The data is synthetic (Zotero database records created for the task), but based on real historical papers.
